Title: Create Task — All Fields Populated
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ADMIN]
Admin session active at {{BACK_URL}}; Task Management module v3.1002.0-pr-28 installed; at least one task type exists in Settings
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{BACK_URL}}/apps/tasks (or main menu — Tasks)
[BLADE] Wait for 'All tasks' view to load
[ACT] Click 'Add' or 'Create' button to open new-task blade
[BLADE] Wait for create-task blade to open
[ACT] Select a task type from the 'Type' dropdown
[ACT] Fill 'Summary' field with 'AGENT-TEST-create-all-fields'
[ACT] Fill 'Description' field with 'Automated test task — all fields'
[ACT] Select 'High' from the 'Priority' dropdown
[ACT] Set 'Due' date to a future date (today + 7 days)
[ACT] Click the 'Assignee' field and search for {{ADMIN_EMAIL}}; select the result
[SAVE] Click 'Save' and wait for success notification
Assertions:
[TOAST] Success notification appears (e.g. 'Saved' or 'Task created')
[BLADE] Create-task blade closes or shows the created task detail
[FORM] Task record displays Summary = 'AGENT-TEST-create-all-fields'
[FORM] Priority field shows 'High'
[FORM] Assignee field shows the selected user name
[FORM] Due date is populated with the future date
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /api/task-management/search with name filter returns the new task record
[API] Returned record has non-empty id and name = 'AGENT-TEST-create-all-fields'
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in Admin SPA during create flow
[NETWORK] No 4xx/5xx on task-management API calls during create
Failure_Signals: Blade does not open; 'Save' button disabled after filling fields; 500 on POST /api/task-management; spinner visible >5s; toast shows error message; Assignee search returns no results
Cleanup: Delete the created task via Admin UI or DELETE /api/task-management with ids=[captured task id]
References: module VirtoCommerce.TaskManagement v3.1002.0-pr-28; surface live-verified vcptcore-qa; contracts live-verified vcptcore-qa 2026-06-10

Title: Assign Task to User — Assignee Receives Email Notification
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ADMIN]
Admin session active; a valid member user exists searchable by {{USER_EMAIL}}; notification toggle enabled in Settings — Task management — Notifications; Hangfire dashboard accessible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{BACK_URL}}/apps/tasks
[BLADE] Wait for 'All tasks' view to load
[ACT] Click 'Add' / 'Create' to open new-task blade
[ACT] Fill 'Summary' with 'AGENT-TEST-assign-notification'
[ACT] Select any task type from 'Type' dropdown
[ACT] Set 'Due' date to a future date (today + 7 days)
[ACT] Click 'Assignee' field; search for {{USER_EMAIL}}; select the matching member (Assignee is required -- Save is disabled without it)
[SAVE] Click 'Save' and wait for success notification
[WAIT] Wait 10s for notification job to be queued
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/task-management/search returns task with responsibleName matching the selected member

[CONSOLE] No JS errors
[NETWORK] No 4xx/5xx on task-management or notification API calls
Failure_Signals: Assignee field does not accept the member; Save button remains disabled (Assignee is mandatory); Save fails; Hangfire job not created; notification job fails; spinner >5s

Title: Delete Task — Task Removed from All Views

Title: API — Search Tasks with Paging Returns Correct Structure
Preconditions: Admin Bearer token obtainable; at least 5 tasks exist in the system
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token with grant_type=password; username={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}; password={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}; capture access_token
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/search with body {take: 3, skip: 0} and Authorization: Bearer <token>
[WAIT] Wait for 200 response
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/search with body {take: 3, skip: 3} and Authorization: Bearer <token>
[WAIT] Wait for 200 response
Assertions:
[STATUS] Both requests return HTTP 200
[BODY] First page response contains 'totalCount' integer field
[BODY] First page 'results' array length is <= 3
[SCHEMA] Each result item contains fields: id; name; priority; status
[BODY] Second page 'results' items differ from first page items (no overlap — paging works)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] Both POST requests complete without timeout (< 3s)
[CONSOLE] No JS errors
Failure_Signals: Non-200 response; 'results' field absent; totalCount missing; second page returns same items as first; response time > 3s
Cleanup: none
References: module VirtoCommerce.TaskManagement v3.1002.0-pr-28; surface live-verified vcptcore-qa; contracts live-verified vcptcore-qa 2026-06-10

Title: API — Create Task Then Retrieve by ID (Round-Trip)
Preconditions: Admin Bearer token obtainable; GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/tasks/types returns non-empty list; POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/members/search (body {take:1}) returns at least one member
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token; capture access_token
[SETUP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/members/search with body {take:1}; capture results[0].id as assignee_id and results[0].name as assignee_name
[SETUP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/tasks/types; capture first type name as task_type
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management with body {name: 'AGENT-TEST-api-create'; priority: 'Normal'; description: 'API create test'; type: <task_type>; responsibleId: <assignee_id>; responsibleName: <assignee_name>; dueDate: <today+7days ISO8601>} and Authorization: Bearer <token>
[WAIT] Wait for response
[SETUP] Capture 'id' field from POST response body
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/{captured-id} with Authorization: Bearer <token>
[WAIT] Wait for 200 response
Assertions:
[STATUS] POST returns HTTP 200 or 201
[BODY] POST response contains non-empty 'id' field
[STATUS] GET by id returns HTTP 200
[BODY] GET response 'name' equals 'AGENT-TEST-api-create'
[BODY] GET response 'priority' equals 'Normal'
[BODY] GET response 'responsibleId' equals the captured assignee_id
[BODY] GET response 'isActive' equals true
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] Navigate to {{BACK_URL}}/apps/tasks — task 'AGENT-TEST-api-create' appears in 'All tasks' grid
[NETWORK] Both API calls complete without 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: POST returns 4xx or 5xx; response has no 'id'; GET returns 404; name or priority does not match payload; POST returns 500 (indicates missing required field -- check responsibleId/type/dueDate are present); Admin UI does not show the task
Cleanup: DELETE {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management with body {ids: [captured-id]} and Authorization: Bearer <token>
References: module VirtoCommerce.TaskManagement v3.1002.0-pr-28; surface live-verified vcptcore-qa; contracts live-verified vcptcore-qa 2026-06-10

Preconditions: Admin Bearer token obtainable; at least one task exists in the system (live-discovered via search)
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token; capture access_token
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/search with body {take: 1}; capture first result as full task object (id, name, type, priority, responsibleId, responsibleName, dueDate, and all other fields)
[SETUP] Store original name for cleanup
[HTTP] PUT {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management with the FULL task object body, changing only: name to 'AGENT-TEST-api-updated' and priority to 'High'; Authorization: Bearer <token> (PUT requires the complete WorkTask object -- partial body causes 500)
[WAIT] Wait for 200 response
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/{id} to verify update
Assertions:
[STATUS] PUT returns HTTP 200
[STATUS] GET after PUT returns HTTP 200
[BODY] GET response 'name' equals 'AGENT-TEST-api-updated'
[BODY] GET response 'priority' equals 'High'
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] No 4xx/5xx on PUT or GET
[ADMIN] Admin UI 'All tasks' grid reflects the updated task name after refresh
Failure_Signals: PUT returns 4xx or 5xx; GET after PUT still shows old name; priority not persisted; response time > 3s; PUT returns 500 (indicates partial body sent -- must PUT the full WorkTask object)
Cleanup: PUT the original name and priority back via full-object PUT /api/task-management to restore the task
References: module VirtoCommerce.TaskManagement v3.1002.0-pr-28; surface live-verified vcptcore-qa; contracts live-verified vcptcore-qa 2026-06-10

Title: API — Finish Task with Completed Result Sets Status Done
Preconditions: Admin Bearer token obtainable
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token; capture access_token
[SETUP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/members/search with body {take:1}; capture results[0].id as assignee_id and results[0].name as assignee_name
[SETUP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/tasks/types; capture first type name
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management with body {name: 'AGENT-TEST-finish-done'; priority: 'Normal'; type: <type>; responsibleId: <assignee_id>; responsibleName: <assignee_name>; dueDate: <today+7days ISO8601>}; capture created task id
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/finish?id=<task-id>&completed=true with Authorization: Bearer <token> -- NO request body (contract: query params only)
[WAIT] Wait for response
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/{id} to verify final state
Assertions:
[STATUS] POST /api/task-management/finish returns HTTP 200
[BODY] GET response 'completed' equals true
[BODY] GET response 'isActive' equals false
[NOTE] In this build 'status' field remains null even after a valid finish -- assert on completed/isActive only, NOT on status=='Done'
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] Task appears in 'Archive tasks' view in Admin UI
[NETWORK] No 4xx/5xx on finish or GET
Failure_Signals: POST /finish returns 4xx or 5xx; completed still false after finish; isActive still true; task not found in archive; sending a request body instead of query params causes incorrect behavior
Cleanup: Task is already archived in Done state — no additional cleanup needed
References: module VirtoCommerce.TaskManagement v3.1002.0-pr-28; surface live-verified vcptcore-qa; contracts live-verified vcptcore-qa 2026-06-10

Title: API — Finish Task with Rejected Result Sets Status Canceled
Preconditions: Admin Bearer token obtainable
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token; capture access_token
[SETUP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/members/search with body {take:1}; capture results[0].id as assignee_id and results[0].name as assignee_name
[SETUP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/tasks/types; capture first type name
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management with body {name: 'AGENT-TEST-finish-canceled'; priority: 'Low'; type: <type>; responsibleId: <assignee_id>; responsibleName: <assignee_name>; dueDate: <today+7days ISO8601>}; capture task id
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/finish?id=<task-id>&completed=false with Authorization: Bearer <token> -- NO request body (contract: query params only)
[WAIT] Wait for response
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/{id}
Assertions:
[STATUS] POST /api/task-management/finish returns HTTP 200
[BODY] GET response 'completed' equals false
[BODY] GET response 'isActive' equals false
[NOTE] In this build 'status' field remains null even after a valid finish -- assert on completed/isActive only, NOT on status=='Canceled'
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] Task appears in 'Archive tasks' with status 'Canceled'
[NETWORK] No 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: POST /finish returns 4xx; completed not false; isActive still true; task not in archive; sending a request body instead of query params causes incorrect behavior
Cleanup: Task is archived — no additional cleanup; DELETE via /api/task-management if needed
References: module VirtoCommerce.TaskManagement v3.1002.0-pr-28; surface live-verified vcptcore-qa; contracts live-verified vcptcore-qa 2026-06-10

Title: API — Unauthenticated Request Returns 401 Unauthorized
Preconditions: No valid Bearer token available (unauthenticated context)
Steps:
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management/search with body {} and NO Authorization header
[WAIT] Wait for response
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 401 Unauthorized (or 403 Forbidden)
[BODY] Response body does not contain task data (no 'results' array or 'totalCount')
Cross_Layer_Checks: [NETWORK] No task data leaked in 401 or 403 response
Failure_Signals: Response returns 200 with task data (auth bypass); response returns 5xx instead of 4xx
Cleanup: none

Title: API — Create Task with Empty Body Returns 4xx Validation Error
Preconditions: Admin Bearer token obtainable
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token; capture access_token
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/task-management with body {} (empty — no name or type) and Authorization: Bearer <token>
[WAIT] Wait for response
Assertions:
[STATUS] Expected HTTP 400 Bad Request or 422 Unprocessable Entity (clean validation rejection)
[BODY] Response contains an error message or validation details
[BODY] Response does not contain a new task 'id'
[NOTE] Observed current behavior (vcptcore-qa 2026-06-10): server returns HTTP 500 (cast error, not a clean 4xx); a nameless record may be persisted -- this is an API-hygiene defect (minor, non-blocker) not a critical regression
Cross_Layer_Checks: [NETWORK] No 201 Created response
Failure_Signals: Request returns 200 or 201 with a complete task record (should not happen); no error detail in response body. NOTE: HTTP 500 with cast error is the currently observed behavior -- it may persist a nameless record; confirm via POST /search that no stray record was created
Cleanup: If a nameless record was created (HTTP 500 path), DELETE it via POST /search to find it then DELETE /api/task-management with its id
References: module VirtoCommerce.TaskManagement v3.1002.0-pr-28; surface live-verified vcptcore-qa; contracts live-verified vcptcore-qa 2026-06-10

Title: Filter by Due Date — Grid Shows Only Tasks Within the From/To Window
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ADMIN]
Admin session active; at least 2 tasks with Due dates in different ranges exist (one inside and one outside the chosen window)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{BACK_URL}}/apps/tasks
[BLADE] Wait for 'All tasks' view
[ACT] Open the filter panel
[ACT] Set 'Due date' From and To to a narrow window expected to exclude most tasks (e.g. today to today)
[ACT] Click 'Apply'
[API] Capture the POST /api/task-management/search request body
[GRID] Inspect all visible task rows
Assertions:
[GRID] Only tasks whose Due date falls within the From-To window are listed
[API] search request body includes startDueDate and endDueDate matching the selected window
[GRID] Tasks with Due dates outside the window are not shown
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /api/task-management/search honors startDueDate/endDueDate (server-side verified: impossible window returns totalCount 0)
[CONSOLE] No JS errors
[NETWORK] No 4xx/5xx on the filter search request
Failure_Signals: Grid returns out-of-range tasks; request omits startDueDate/endDueDate (sends startDate/endDate or no date params); due-date window silently ignored -- KNOWN DEFECT VCST-5227
Cleanup: Clear Due date filter after test; no data mutation
References: VCST-5227 (Due date filter not applied); module VirtoCommerce.TaskManagement; surface live-verified vcptcore-qa + vcst-qa 2026-06-10
